image: A straw scarecrow standing stiffly at the left edge of a field, arms out, watching whoever passes (the 'person' radical, but a thing, not a person).
Three tiny green bean sprouts pushing up through soil, the middle one tallest — a small, fresh trio.
A single katana blade slicing down through the air on a diagonal, leaving one clean silver slash-mark.
A turkey wishbone caught mid-snap, its two legs splitting apart in opposite directions.
A perfectly flat desert horizon — one unbroken line where sky meets sand, nothing else in sight.
A single glossy black ink droplet hanging from a brush tip, about to fall and make one tiny dot.
A barbed steel fishhook curving into a tight hook, dangling on a line and twitching.
A cat curled into a tidy comma-shaped ball, tail tucked, lazily flicking — a creature with nine lives.
A heavy iron meat hook hanging from a butcher's ceiling rail, its sharp barb pointing up.
Two parallel steel railway rails running side by side into the distance, evenly spaced.
A polished five-pointed tin sheriff's star badge, gleaming, pinned to nothing in mid-air.
A round metal pot lid with a little knob handle, clamped down tight over an unseen pot (the 'lid' top).
An open A-frame stepladder standing on two splayed legs — the bare 'person' shape, but as an object.
The two stubby stone legs of a wishing well, holding the bucket frame up from below.
A canvas tent flap pinned open into an inverted V, inviting you to enter underneath it.
A bare soccer goalpost frame — two uprights and a crossbar — standing open and empty (the 'enclosure-from-above').
A white bedsheet draped over something hidden, its edges hanging down like a cover-cloth.
A tall guillotine blade standing on the right edge, polished and poised to drop and slice (the 'knife' radical).
A single muscular arm flexed hard, a bulging bicep straining — pure raw power, no body attached.
A worn metal soup ladle, its deep bowl tilted as if scooping (the 'spoon' radical, the utensil).
A clean plus-sign crossroads painted on tarmac where two straight roads meet at right angles.
A forked divining twig held out flat, one short prong jutting off — a fortune-teller's stick.
A yellow rubber dish-glove lying palm-up, fingers loosely curled — the 'right hand' as an empty glove.
A wide-open cartoon mouth, a perfect square hole, lips parted as if mid-shout.
A square stone-walled enclosure with no gate, hemming in everything inside its four high walls.
A small dark mound of freshly dug soil heaped on flat ground, a sprout-marker stuck on top.
An empty horned warrior's helmet resting on a stand, broad at the brow, tapering down (the 'samurai/scholar').
A single muddy footprint trailing off behind, toes dragging — the mark of someone who just walked away.
A thin crescent evening moon, low and orange, hanging just above the dusk skyline.
A big orange starfish spread wide, arms flung out in all directions, sprawled across a rock.
An elegant glass hourglass with a pinched waist, sand streaming from top bulb to bottom.
A woven wicker basket cradling a swaddled bundle, rocking gently — a baby's crib-basket.
A yellow retractable tape measure pulled out a single inch, the metal tongue quivering (the 'inch/measure').
A thin trickle of sand falling between two splashes — three small grains scattering downward.
A triple-peaked rocky mountain, the middle summit tallest, snow-capped against the sky.
Three fast parallel channels of white-water river rapids rushing straight downhill.
A red steel I-beam girder lying flat, a top plate and bottom plate joined by a vertical spine (the 'craft/work').
A tall thin radio antenna mast with one crossbar near the top, planted upright on a roof.
Two short stone pillars standing close together side by side, capped by a shared little ledge.
A tiny pale silkworm cocoon, a coiled thread of fine silk wound into a small soft knot.
A narrow footpath that forks left, a worn walking-trail branching where two ways split (the 'step/go' radical).
A bright round midday sun blazing in a clear sky, a small dot at its blazing center.
A full silver moon glowing low and close, its two faint surface-stripes visible across the disc.
A sturdy bare tree with a straight trunk, two branches reaching up and two roots spreading down.
A heavy iron padlock snapped shut over a strap, its shackle locked tight, forbidding entry (the 'do-not' radical).
A round white milk jug with two dotted spouts, brimming and warm, ready to pour (the 'mother', as a thing).
A coiling wisp of steam vapor rising and curling off a hot surface, faint and twisting.
A towering tsunami wave curling over, white spray flying off its crest, about to crash down.
A crackling bonfire, flames leaping up in tongues with sparks flying off both sides.
Two woodsman's axes crossed in an X, blades up, mounted on a wall (the 'father' radical, as objects).
A single tall wooden bed-plank split off the left of a cot frame, propped upright (the 'split wood/bed').
A heavy golden king's crown sitting on a velvet cushion, three jeweled points across the top.
A single green plant just breaking ground, one fresh leaf unfurling above a thickening stem — raw life.
A flooded rice paddy divided by mud dikes into a neat four-square grid, seen from above.
A single tall white candle with a tiny pale flame on top, dripping wax — stark and white.
A big unblinking eye, a vertical rectangle with a dark pupil, staring straight at you.
A small handful of white rice grains scattered outward from a central point, flung in all directions.
A single large ear cupped forward, straining to catch a faint sound, lobe twitching.
A calligraphy brush gripped upright mid-stroke, its inky tip pressing down to draw a line.
A long pink tongue lolling out and curling, dripping, sticking far out of an unseen mouth.
A busy four-way city junction with crosswalks on every side, traffic flowing through the intersection (the 'go/street').
A round birdcage on a windowsill with the red setting sun sinking behind its bars in the west.
A submarine periscope poking up, its big round eye-lens swiveling on two thin legs to look around.
A solid comic speech bubble with stacked lines of words inside, a lid on top, pointing at a speaker.
A wooden cartwheel with a central hub and crossing spokes, rolling along on its own.
A gleaming pyramid-topped gold ingot with two glinting flecks of metal at its base, heavy and bright.
A long silk tassel hanging from a banner, its many fine strands trailing very long down the wall (the 'long' radical).
A massive two-leaf wooden castle gate, both heavy doors swung open in a stone gateway.
A grey rain cloud boxed in the sky, four fat raindrops falling in a row beneath it.
A bowl of rice heaped to a peak under a domed lid just lifted off, steam curling up — a full meal.
A tall narrow watchtower with a peaked roof and a little lit window high up, looming over the town.
A single vertical lightning bolt cracking straight down from sky to ground in one blinding line.
The simple peaked roof of a pup tent, two canvas sides meeting at a sharp ridge, sheltering whatever's below.
